description: Hot-memo layered session signal — abbreviated $S in tool responses, expand via GET /schemas/hotmemo:v1

layer.description: Which hotmemo layer emitted this row

source.description: Origin within the layer (e.g. push, passive, action_logger, staleness-detector)

signal.description: Signal type or action (e.g. suggest, fire_signal, no-type-tag, !!:critical)

detail.description: Payload — tool name, message, count, or flag detail
